name: Devil Fruit: Yomi Yomi no Mi (Example)

description.value:
Archetype Artifact — Devil Fruit

A mysterious spiral-patterned fruit suffused with supernatural energy. Consuming this fruit permanently grants the Revive-Revive archetype, awakening a second soul within the user's body.

Activate [one-action] (concentrate) — You use an ability from your Revive-Revive archetype. See archetype entries for specific actions.

Trait: Sea-Bound. While submerged in standing seawater (at least waist-deep) or in contact with Seastone, you are Slowed 1, Clumsy 1, and cannot use any actions or passives granted by your Devil Fruit archetype. If fully submerged, you are Stunned until removed from the water.

A creature may only ever consume one Devil Fruit. Consuming a second is instantly fatal.
description.gm: Replace this placeholder with your campaign's specific Revive-Revive archetype feat chain. The Sea-Bound effect is applied automatically by the module when this item is present in the actor's inventory and the token is in a sea-water region.
